This hybrid delivers a hard-hitting mental buzz paired with a relaxing body calm—perfect for daytime creativity or nighttime chill. A hybrid that lights up your mood, sharpens your thoughts, and melts away tension without knocking you out. Expect an uplifting start that hits fast, with a mental rush that sparks laughter and boosts focus. As the high settles, a gentle wave of relaxation eases the body while keeping your mind clear and engaged. effects_provenance.raw: Birthday Cake - THCA BULK Flower - Greenhouse 1 pound Birthday Cake - Decadent Creamy Dessert Hybrid Birthday Cake is an indica-dominant hybrid with a lush, calming character that settles the senses while keeping the mind pleasantly uplifted; the flower presents dense, frosted nugs dusted with amber trichomes and deep violet undertones. Aromas of sweet vanilla, toasted sugar, and a hint of baked dough lead into a creamy, buttery flavor profile with subtle citrus and spice on the finish, offering a refined, bakery-like experience that feels both natural and sophisticated. Terpene Profile The aroma and effects are shaped by a balanced blend of classic dessert-forward terpenes: Myrcene : Provides a mellow, earthy foundation that softens the overall profile and encourages relaxed comfort. Caryophyllene : Brings warm, peppery spice notes and adds a rounded, savory depth to the sweetness. Limonene : Lifts the bouquet with bright citrus highlights that sharpen aroma clarity and add a clean, lively edge. Effects Birthday Cake delivers a smooth, settling experience—initially warm and euphoric with a gentle uplift in mood, then gradually deepening into relaxed ease across the body without heavy sedation; it’s ideal for quiet evenings or moments when you want to unwind with a composed, contented mindset. Gold Standard

PRODUCT DETAILS: What Are Smalls? Smalls are smaller buds harvested from the lower branches of the same plants that produce our full-size premium flower. They contain identical genetics, terpene profiles, and cannabinoid content. The only difference is bud size. Many experienced smokers prefer smalls for rolling, grinding, or daily use because the value per gram is significantly better. What You Get Each bag contains a mix of strains from our current indoor harvest rotation. The specific strains vary by batch, which is part of the fun. Every strain in the mix meets the same quality standards as our individual product offerings: hand-trimmed, cold-cured, lab-tested, and nitrogen-sealed. Growing Process All flower in Surprise Party Smalls comes from our indoor grow rooms, cultivated under full-spectrum LED in small batches. Hand-tended and hand-trimmed, cold-cured at 60F for 14+ days. No synthetic pesticides, no PGRs. The same process as every other Secret Nature flower product. effects_provenance.raw: Indoor Banana MAC CBD THCa Flower Delta-8 2 Gram Comet Prerolled What is Banana MAC CBD THCa Flower Strain? Looking for a fun and delicious way to enjoy your favorite cannabis strain? Look no further than Banana MAC CBD THCa Flower Strain ! These Buds are fresh and dense, shaped like hail-sized golf balls and reminiscent of overripe bananas and banana bread. Banana MAC is a hemp expression of a similar high THCa variety bred by the famed breeder Capulator. A unique cut, Banana MAC is grown indoors, and is a powerhouse for effects. Extremely potent and frosty, Banana MAC is not to be underestimated. It uniquely expresses high amounts of THCA, while still maintaining delta-9 compliance. Banana MAC is high in the terpene Linalool and Limonene, two terpenes rarely found as dominant in hemp varieties. No matter how you choose to enjoy them, Banana MAC is sure to please! Type I, Type II, and Type III Banana MAC: Banana MAC Type III Strain Cannabinoids CBD: 16.43% Total Cannabinoids: 20.85% Terpenes: 1.48% Banana MAC Type II Strain Cannabinoids CBD: 9.92% THCA: 5% Total Cannabinoids: 17.92% Terpenes: 1.48% Banana MAC Type I Strain Cannabinoids THCA: 22.24% Total Cannabinoids: 24.50% Terpenes: 1.48% Banana MAC Strain Terpene Profile Myrcene (0.81%) Linalool (0.35%) Limonene (0.14%) Banana MAC CBD THCA Strain Effects Looking for a strain that will leave you feeling uplifted and comfortable? Look no further than the Banana MAC! This indica-dominant hybrid features high levels of THCA, making it perfect for those seeking powerful effects. effects_provenance.raw: Strawberry Express THCa Flower 3.5g All aboard the flavor train. Strawberry Express THCa Flower delivers a smooth, sweet-smoking experience with uplifting effects and serious bag appeal. This fruity, sativa-leaning hybrid offers the perfect balance of focused energy and calming body vibes , making it a top pick for daytime use. Expect dense, frosty buds with a bold strawberry aroma, subtle creaminess, and notes of earth on the exhale. The flavor is clean, smooth, and unmistakably berry-forward. Whether you’re looking to elevate your mood or spark some creative energy, this strain delivers every time. effects_provenance.raw: Wedding Cake THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Wedding Cake THCA Flower — also known as Pink Cookies — is a powerful indica-dominant hybrid bred from Cherry Pie crossed with Girl Scout Cookies (GSC) . The cultivar is celebrated for its frosty bag appeal, dense bud structure, and the rich, dessert-rich aromatic profile that built its modern reputation. Effects Wedding Cake delivers a rich, relaxing high paired with balanced cerebral euphoria. The high lands steadily, the body settles into comfortable ease, and the head stays warmly engaged — making this a strong cultivar for late-afternoon use, social settings, or evening flavor-led decompression. A broadly-pleasing, top-shelf hybrid. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: sweet vanilla up front, with warm cake-cookie notes through the middle and a smooth, dessert-rich finish on the exhale. Smoke is silky and unmistakably bakery-leaning. The terpene profile reads vanilla-and-cookie — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Wedding Cake harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Wedding Cake THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Wedding Cake THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Cake indica Sweet Vanilla THCA Flower Lost In Translation

effects_provenance.raw: Runtz THCA Flower Preferred / 28g Strain Profile Runtz THCA Flower is a celebrated hybrid created by crossing two legendary genetics: the candy-sweet Zkittlez and the creamy, dessert-like Gelato , bred by the renowned Cookies Fam . The cultivar is responsible for an entire family of modern crosses — the original frost-blanketed, fruit-candy bag appeal that built the modern Runtz category. Effects Runtz delivers a balanced experience that pairs uplifting cerebral euphoria with comfortable body relaxation. The high feels social and pleasant — suitable for daytime use, group settings, or evening flavor-led decompression — with the kind of broadly-pleasing character that earned this strain its modern legend status. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: sugary candy sweetness up front, with tropical fruits through the middle and a subtle floral-creamy finish on the exhale. Smoke is smooth and unmistakably bright. The terpene profile reads candy-and-tropical-fruit — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Runtz harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Runtz THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Runtz THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Candy hybrid Sugar Tropical Fruit THCA Flower Lost In Translation

effects_provenance.raw: Grape Creamsicle THCa Weight: 14g Grape Creamsicle THCa tests at 31.69% THCa, an indica leaning hybrid that wraps grape candy sweetness around a mellow, cushioned high. The effects begin with a gentle euphoric lift that brightens mood and takes the edge off the day. The high then spreads into a soft, full-body relaxation that lands peaceful rather than heavy, keeping you present and easygoing. It settles into a calm, content state that invites long conversations and slow evenings. It’s the perfect strain for relaxed nights in, low-key hangouts, and easing off the throttle without checking out completely. 31.69% total THCa 31.88% total cannabinoids Indica Dom. Hybrid / Evening strain Greenhouse Grown Farm bill compliant (below .3% delta-9 THC) Certificate of Analysis (COA) [vc_row full_width=”stretch_row” content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1575559006742{padding-top: 35px !important;}” mobile_bg_img_hidden=”no” tablet_bg_img_hidden=”no” woodmart_parallax=”0′′ woodmart_gradient_switch=”no” row_reverse_mobile=”0′′ row_reverse_tablet=”0′′ woodmart_disable_overflow=”0′′ el_id=”more”][vc_column width=”2/3′′ css=”.vc_custom_1575559577606{margin-bottom: 4vh !important;padding-top: 0px !important;}” offset=”vc_col-sm-offset-2′′ mobile_bg_img_hidden=”no” tablet_bg_img_hidden=”no” woodmart_parallax=”0′′ woodmart_sticky_column=”false” parallax_scroll=”no” mobile_reset_margin=”no” tablet_reset_margin=”no”] Grape Creamsicle THCa Buds [vc_tta_accordion style=”flat” color=”black” c_icon=”chevron” c_position=”right” active_section=”1′′][vc_tta_section title=”Visual” tab_id=”visual”][vc_column_text css=”” text_larger=”yes” woodmart_inline=”no”]The buds are large and chunky with a rugged, textured structure and a healthy shimmer of trichomes throughout. Light sage and olive greens dominate the palette, threaded generously with amber and rust-colored pistils that give the flower a warm glow.[/vc_column_text][/vc_tta_section][vc_tta_section title=”Aroma” tab_id=”aroma”][vc_column_text css=”” text_larger=”yes” woodmart_inline=”no”]Grape Creamsicle THCa smells like the name promises. Grape candy jumps out first, sweet and unmistakable, followed by a smooth vanilla-cream layer that softens the fruit into something dessert-like. Underneath sits a light citrus zest and a touch of earth that keeps the profile from tipping into pure candy. Broken open, the grape deepens and the cream gets richer.[/vc_column_text][/vc_tt
